TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Pacidal, title = Pacidal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pacidal} }

S.FORM: Pacidal ŤŹĮťôĹťÉ®ŤźĹ kakilimaan i Hualien(Kalingku) a kuwan ,u niyazu' nu Pangcah, u Pacidal ku ngangan tina niyazu'. nilacul u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Pacidal. u kasalumaluma' nu Pacidal sa, 161 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 398 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 285 ku tademaw, pakalatu 72%. u zuma sa, cay ku yincumin, 113 ku tademaw, pakalatu 28%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 52%, Sakizaya 1%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 5%, Tayan(Tayal) 1%, Taluku(Truku) 9%, zumazuma 3%. u Pangcah a niyazu' u Pangcah(Amis) atu Sakizaya a niyazu' kuyni. u tumuk nu niyazu' u Sakizaya a tadamaw tu nuayaw katukuh ayza. u zuma a tademaw sa u Taluku(Truku) atu Tayan(Tayal). yadah ku cidekay itini. u Sakizaya a tademaw izawtu ku Sakizaya itini mueneng, caykatuud ku Sakizaya a tademaw, uzuma a tademaw sa u Taluku, Tayan atu Yuwatan, katuud ku Hulalm intini mueneng. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin tademaw nu yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 2 a bulad ademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 6 a bulad pulung sausi (562,395), Pangcah (209,851), Tayan (90,309), Paywan (100,872), Yuwatan (58,509), Rukay (13,326), Puyuma (14,199), Cou (6,632), Saysiat (6,624), Yami (4,615), Saw (788), Kabalan (1,471), Taluku (31,552), Sakizaya (944), Sejek (10,046), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (338), zuma (11,918) tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 10 a bulad pulung sausi (564,603), Pangcah (210,658), Tayan (90,719), Paywan (101,346), Yuwatan (58,759), Rukay (13,373), Puyuma (14,303), Cou (6,659), Saysiat (6,648), Yami (4,625), Saw (792), Kabalan (1,478), Taluku (31,742), Sakizaya (952), Sejek (10,132), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (342), zuma (11,670) tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541) u siwkay nu yincumin u Yincumin a kamu nu Sakizaya sananay, u ngiha' nu Hulam a kamu nu "ŚéüšĹŹśįĎ". u sakaizaay saan, u saayaway mueneng itiniay a tademaw sananay, itini uyiniyan a subal, tina subal a ngangan sa ku "Taywan", u Hulam a sulit sa ku ŚŹįÁĀ£. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiayay a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong , u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu, sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangabulanay . inayay ku cacudadan i Angcoh niyazu'. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan Paykanatalay a pu lumuluma'ay a se kitakit kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan Yincumincu weiyuanhuy kanatal kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan sausi kalunasulitan atu palatuh Taywan Yuancumincu nalunasulitan atu palatuh calay zazan laculaculan calay zazan
S.PHON: pa ¶idar~…ĺ **** kakir~…ĺimaan i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn(kar~…ĺiŇčku) a kuwan ,u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß, u pa ¶idar~…ĺ ku ŇčaŇčan tina nijazu Ē~ °. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu pa ¶idar~…ĺ. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu pa ¶idar~…ĺ sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jin ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, sakizaja *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, tar~…ĺuku(truku) *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) atu sakizaja a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. u tumuk nu nijazu Ē~ ° u sakizaja a tadamaw tu nuajaw katukuńß ajza. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u tar~…ĺuku(truku) atu tajan(tajar~…ĺ). jadańß ku ¶id…ôkaj itini. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izawtu ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, ¶ajkatuud ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw, uzuma a tad…ômaw sa u tar~…ĺuku, tajan atu juwatan, katuud ku ńßur~…ĺar~…ĺm intini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad ad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin a kamu nu sakizaja sananaj, u Ňčińßa Ē~ ° nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu nu "***". u sakaizaaj saan, u saajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇč itiniaj a tad…ômaw sananaj, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ, tina subar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan sa ku "tajwan", u ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit sa ku **. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiajaj a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč , u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u, saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčabur~…ĺanaj . inajaj ku ¶a ¶udadan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan pajkanatar~…ĺaj a pu r~…ĺumur~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj a s…ô kitakit kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan jin ¶umin ¶u w…ôijuanńßuj kanatar~…ĺ kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan sausi kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß tajwan juan ¶umin ¶u nar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj zazan r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶ar~…ĺaj zazan
S.FORM: Pacidal ŤŹĮťôĹťÉ®ŤźĹ kakilimaan i Hualien(Kalingku) a kuwan ,u niyazu' nu Pangcah, u Pacidal ku ngangan tina niyazu'. nilacul u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Pacidal. u kasalumaluma' nu Pacidal sa, 161 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 398 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 285 ku tademaw, pakalatu 72%. u zuma sa, cay ku yincumin, 113 ku tademaw, pakalatu 28%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 52%, Sakizaya 1%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 5%, Tayan(Tayal) 1%, Taluku(Truku) 9%, zumazuma 3%. u Pangcah a niyazu' u Pangcah(Amis) atu Sakizaya a niyazu' kuyni. u tumuk nu niyazu' u Sakizaya a tadamaw tu nuayaw katukuh ayza. u zuma a tademaw sa u Taluku(Truku) atu Tayan(Tayal). yadah ku cidekay itini. u Sakizaya a tademaw izawtu ku Sakizaya itini mueneng, caykatuud ku Sakizaya a tademaw, uzuma a tademaw sa u Taluku, Tayan atu Yuwatan, katuud ku Hulalm intini mueneng. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin tademaw nu yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 2 a bulad ademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 6 a bulad pulung sausi (562,395), Pangcah (209,851), Tayan (90,309), Paywan (100,872), Yuwatan (58,509), Rukay (13,326), Puyuma (14,199), Cou (6,632), Saysiat (6,624), Yami (4,615), Saw (788), Kabalan (1,471), Taluku (31,552), Sakizaya (944), Sejek (10,046), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (338), zuma (11,918) tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 10 a bulad pulung sausi (564,603), Pangcah (210,658), Tayan (90,719), Paywan (101,346), Yuwatan (58,759), Rukay (13,373), Puyuma (14,303), Cou (6,659), Saysiat (6,648), Yami (4,625), Saw (792), Kabalan (1,478), Taluku (31,742), Sakizaya (952), Sejek (10,132), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (342), zuma (11,670) tademaw nu Yuancumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541) u siwkay nu yincumin u Yincumin a kamu nu Sakizaya sananay, u ngiha' nu Hulam a kamu nu "ŚéüšĹŹśįĎ". u sakaizaay saan, u saayaway mueneng itiniay a tademaw sananay, itini uyiniyan a subal, tina subal a ngangan sa ku "Taywan", u Hulam a sulit sa ku ŚŹįÁĀ£. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiayay a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong , u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu, sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangabulanay . inayay ku cacudadan i Angcoh niyazu'. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan Paykanatalay a pu lumuluma'ay a se kitakit kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan Yincumincu weiyuanhuy kanatal kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan sausi kalunasulitan atu palatuh Taywan Yuancumincu nalunasulitan atu palatuh calay zazan laculaculan calay zazan
S.PHON: pa ¶idar~…ĺ **** kakir~…ĺimaan i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn(kar~…ĺiŇčku) a kuwan ,u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß, u pa ¶idar~…ĺ ku ŇčaŇčan tina nijazu Ē~ °. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu pa ¶idar~…ĺ. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu pa ¶idar~…ĺ sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jin ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, sakizaja *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, tar~…ĺuku(truku) *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) atu sakizaja a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. u tumuk nu nijazu Ē~ ° u sakizaja a tadamaw tu nuajaw katukuńß ajza. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u tar~…ĺuku(truku) atu tajan(tajar~…ĺ). jadańß ku ¶id…ôkaj itini. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izawtu ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, ¶ajkatuud ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw, uzuma a tad…ômaw sa u tar~…ĺuku, tajan atu juwatan, katuud ku ńßur~…ĺar~…ĺm intini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad ad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu juan ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin a kamu nu sakizaja sananaj, u Ňčińßa Ē~ ° nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu nu "***". u sakaizaaj saan, u saajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇč itiniaj a tad…ômaw sananaj, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ, tina subar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan sa ku "tajwan", u ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit sa ku **. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiajaj a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč , u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u, saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčabur~…ĺanaj . inajaj ku ¶a ¶udadan i aŇč ¶ońß nijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan pajkanatar~…ĺaj a pu r~…ĺumur~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj a s…ô kitakit kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan jin ¶umin ¶u w…ôijuanńßuj kanatar~…ĺ kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan sausi kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß tajwan juan ¶umin ¶u nar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj zazan r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶ar~…ĺaj zazan
